name: contradiction-resolution
triggers: Text flags disagreement between sources: contradicts, inconsistent, conflicts, disagrees, doesn't match, or 'but X says/shows/reports'
Two inputs state different values for the same named quantity
A draft's conclusion uses one side of a detected conflict without resolution or caveat
counterindications: Values differ because windows, units, or populations differ and this scoping is already stated
The differing values are experimental arms or deliberate counterfactuals meant to differ
